explanation: The architecture diagram shows a well-defined separation of concerns based on business capabilities (Product Catalog, User, Shopping Cart) and a distinct technical capability (Search). Each service has a substantial and logical responsibility. For instance, separating the Search service is a common pattern that allows for specialized technology (Elasticsearch) and independent scaling. Similarly, the Product Catalog, User, and Shopping Cart services represent core, non-trivial domains of an e-commerce platform. None of the services appear to be overly fine-grained or have a responsibility so trivial that it would not justify its existence as a separate deployable unit.
